ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_sentiment" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sentiment analysis */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol for the company */,
  "compound_score" REAL /* Compound sentiment score */,
  "positive_score" REAL /* Positive sentiment score */,
  "neutral_score" REAL /* Neutral sentiment score */,
  "negative_score" REAL /* Negative sentiment score */,
  "polarity_score" REAL /* Polarity score */,
  "subjectivity_score" REAL /* Subjectivity score */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "returns" REAL /* Daily return of the stock */,
  "label" INTEGER /* Label indicating the expected stock movement (1: up, 0: stable, -1: down) */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the sentiment data (e.g., news article, social media, financial report) */,
  "source_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the source (e.g., article ID, tweet ID) */,
  "sentiment_text" TEXT /* The actual text from the source that was analyzed for sentiment */,
  "ml_model_version" TEXT /* The version of the machine learning model used for sentiment analysis */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* The confidence score of the sentiment analysis */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* The market capitalization of the company on the given date */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* The price-to-earnings ratio of the stock on the given date */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* The dividend yield of the stock on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "stock_symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Unique stock symbol for the company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company operates in */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the company */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio of the stock */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share of the stock */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta value of the stock, indicating its volatility relative to the market */,
  "52_week_high" REAL /* 52-week high price of the stock */,
  "52_week_low" REAL /* 52-week low price of the stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the stock data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the sentiment category (e.g., Positive, Neutral, Negative) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sentiment category */,
  "threshold_positive" REAL /* The threshold for a sentiment to be classified as positive */,
  "threshold_negative" REAL /* The threshold for a sentiment to be classified as negative */,
  "threshold_neutral" REAL /* The threshold for a sentiment to be classified as neutral */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user prediction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the prediction */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol for the company */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  "predicted_movement" INTEGER /* Predicted movement of the stock (1: up, 0: stable, -1: down) */,
  "actual_movement" INTEGER /* Actual movement of the stock (1: up, 0: stable, -1: down) */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the prediction (1 for correct, 0 for incorrect) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* The confidence score of the user's prediction */,
  "prediction_text" TEXT /* The text or reasoning behind the user's prediction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the prediction was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time the prediction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_predictions_stock_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("stock_symbol") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_symbol")
)
